title: 日报生成模板优化
summary: Successfully implemented all acceptance criteria with comprehensive test coverage. The implementation adds customizable title format and manual record filtering for daily summaries.
strengths: Comprehensive test coverage with 16 Rust unit tests for synthesis module and 5 for memory_storage
Well-structured helper functions with clear separation of concerns
Frontend tests verify new UI elements work correctly
Database migration handles both new and existing databases gracefully
Default values are sensible and user-friendly
